description_long: This is a large, modern two-story house with a symmetrical facade, featuring prominent bay windows on the front and a spacious, manicured lawn with palm trees. The exterior combines white upper walls with brickwork on the lower level, and the house is surrounded by a black fence. A detached garage with a dark gable roof sits to one side, adjacent to a wide driveway. The backyard includes a covered patio area, a swimming pool, and a children's swing set, all set within a private, fenced yard. Large windows and multiple entry points suggest a bright, open interior, while the overall layout emphasizes both privacy and outdoor living.
description: A modern two-story house with brick and white exterior, bay windows, a detached garage, and landscaped front and back yards with a pool and patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical facade, bay windows, main entry, palm trees, and driveway leading to the detached garage.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the brick and white wall contrast, fenced yard, and the expanse of the driveway and lawn.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a covered patio, swimming pool, swing set, and large windows opening to the outdoor space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage entrance, side lawn, and additional palm trees along the driveway.
attribute_entryway_design: Central main door with steps, flanked by bay windows, small porch, and minimal decorative elements
